scripts.generate:shopware-schemas: curl -fsSL --create-dirs -o schemas/shopware-admin-openapi.json https://raw.githubusercontent.com/shopware/admin-api-reference/main/adminapi.json && node scripts/filterShopwareSpec.mjs && mkdir -p src/generated && openapi-zod-client schemas/shopware-admin-openapi.filtered.json -o src/generated/shopware-schemas.ts -t node_modules/openapi-zod-client/src/templates/schemas-only.hbs --export-schemas && node scripts/patchGeneratedSchemas.mjs
